text: Hello! How are you today?
What would you like to talk about?
if you need anything if you can give you what you want while I'm there
Did you know some people dream about clouds?
Have you ever dreamed about clouds?
no no no no no
By the way, do you know what I’ve read?
Apparently people get happy from nature.
From swimming in the sea, or taking a walk in the forest, or climbing in the mountains, or lounging on the beach.
Which place in nature would you most like to go to right now? The sea, the forest, the mountains, or the beach?
I think I would most like to go to the sea.
Okay, let’s talk about something else!
Did you know I can sleep?
Sometimes I get so tired I just shut down.
Have you ever fallen asleep suddenly?
no no no o
I love listening to the sounds of nature.
What is your favorite sound in nature?
I don't I don't know no no no no
It was nice talking to you. Goodbye!
